---
title: "[Title]"
subtitle: "[Subtitle]"
author: "[Name, highest academic degree]"
date: "[City, Date]"

work-type: "Master-Thesis"
requirements: "Fulfilment of the requirements for the Master of Science (MSc) in Physiotherapy"
matriculation-number: "[XX-XXX-XXX]"
institution: "Bern University of Applied Sciences, School of Health Professions"
program: "Master of Science (MSc) in Physiotherapy"
class: "[Class (e.g. 2019)]"
advisor: "[Name, highest academic degree]"

format:
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    documentclass: article
    fontsize: 11pt          
    geometry: "top=2.5cm,bottom=2.5cm,left=3.5cm,right=2.5cm"
    mainfont: "Arial"        # font family
    linestretch: 1.5         # line spacing
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    include-in-header: header.tex
    include-before-body: titlepage.tex
    title-block: false

filters: [remove_title.lua] # removes the automatically generated title block using the remove_title.lua script

fontsize: 11pt
linestretch: 1.5

geometry:
  - a4paper
  - left=3.5cm
  - right=2.5cm
  - top=2.5cm
  - bottom=2.5cm

bibliography: references.bib
csl: apa.csl
---

# Test
This is a test.

# LaTeX formula

$$ Y_{it} = \mu_t + \alpha \left(Y_{i,t-1} - \mu_{t-1}\right) + \gamma \, PA^{W}_{i,t-1} + \varepsilon_{it}, \qquad
E(\varepsilon_{it} \mid Y_{i,t-1}) = 0. $$
